steps.title: Find y when x = 0
steps.content:
Plug $x = 0$ into $y = 70x + 8$:
$$y = 70(0) + 8 = 8$$
Looking at the tables, choices B and C show $y = 70$ when $x = 0$, which doesn't match. Both A and D show $y = 8$ when $x = 0$, matching our calculation.

steps.title: Verify with x = 2
steps.content:
Plug $x = 2$ into $y = 70x + 8$:
$$y = 70(2) + 8 = 140 + 8 = 148$$
Choice A shows $y = 148$ when $x = 2$, matching our result. Choice D shows $y = 132$, which doesn't match.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
